title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 292.460 - Outside ladder not to be used, when
text:
292.460.  Outside ladder not to be used, when. — No outside ladder shall be used in connection with the construction, repairing, alteration, removal, or any work whatsoever on any building more than two stories in height, as a stairway.
(RSMo 1939 § 10227) 
Prior revision: 1929 § 13270
